soulQuestion: What question do you bring to the cards today?
questionPlaceholder: Describe your situation or ask a specific question...

0.name: The Fool
0.description: Symbolizes a clean slate and a leap of faith.
0.advice: Trust the universe and move forward.

1.name: The Magician
1.description: You have all the tools to succeed.
1.advice: Focus your energy on your goal.

2.name: The High Priestess
2.description: Represents knowledge that comes from within.
2.advice: Listen to your dreams and gut feelings.

3.name: The Empress
3.description: The archetype of mother and nature.
3.advice: Surround yourself with beauty and care for others.

4.name: The Emperor
4.description: Symbol of order and logical thinking.
4.advice: Establish clear rules and take control.

5.name: The Hierophant
5.description: Spiritual guide and keeper of values.

8.name: Strength
8.description: Taming the inner beast with gentleness.

9.name: The Hermit
9.description: Seeking truth in silence and seclusion.

10.name: Wheel of Fortune
10.advice: Flow with the current of events.

12.name: The Hanged Man
12.description: Voluntary pause for a higher purpose.
12.advice: Look at the situation from a different angle.

13.name: Death
13.description: The completion of an old stage.
13.advice: Let go of what no longer serves you.

17.name: The Star
17.description: A light at the end of the tunnel and talents.

18.name: The Moon
18.description: The world of dreams and the subconscious.

19.name: The Sun
19.description: Complete happiness and clarity of purpose.

21.name: The World
21.description: The closing of a cycle and triumph.

c1.name: Ace of Cups
c1.description: Beginning of a deep relationship or spiritual path.
c1.advice: Open your heart to new experiences.

c3.name: Three of Cups
c3.description: Joy of being in a group and sharing success.

c4.name: Four of Cups
c4.description: Absorption in one's own thoughts at the expense of surroundings.
c4.advice: Look around, the universe is giving you a chance.

c5.name: Five of Cups
c5.meaningUpright: Regret, loss, despair, focus on the past.
c5.description: Pain after loss, but hope still remains.

c6.name: Six of Cups
c6.description: Return to roots and good old times.
c6.advice: Allow yourself carefree joy like a child.

c7.name: Seven of Cups
c7.description: Too many options, many of which are just illusions.
c7.advice: Be a realist and make a firm choice.

c8.name: Eight of Cups
c8.meaningReversed: Fear of change, staying in hopelessness.
c8.description: Leaving behind what no longer gives fulfillment.
c8.advice: Have the courage to move into the unknown.

c9.name: Nine of Cups
c9.meaningReversed: Pride, lack of satisfaction despite possession.
c9.description: Card of fulfilled dreams and joy in life.

c10.name: Ten of Cups
c10.meaningUpright: Family happiness, harmony, peace of mind.
c10.description: Emotional absolute and a safe haven.
c10.advice: Take care of your home hearth.

c11.name: Page of Cups
c11.description: A spark of new inspiration or love.

c12.name: Knight of Cups
c12.description: Messenger of love and higher feelings.
c12.advice: Follow your heart, but don't lose your head.

c13.name: Queen of Cups
c13.description: Depth of emotions and unconditional love.
c13.advice: Be a support for yourself and others.

s1.name: Ace of Swords
s1.meaningUpright: Mental clarity, breakthrough, truth, triumph of logic.
s1.description: Power of intellect and cutting through illusions.
s1.advice: Speak the truth and make a logical decision.

s2.name: Two of Swords
s2.meaningReversed: Removing the blindfold, lesser evil, decision.
s2.description: Closing off arguments in fear of pain.
s2.advice: You must make a decision, avoiding it won't help.

s3.name: Three of Swords
s3.description: A difficult experience that teaches and purifies.
s3.advice: Allow yourself to experience emotions to move forward.

s4.name: Four of Swords
s4.description: Time to recharge batteries before the next battle.

s5.name: Five of Swords
s5.meaningReversed: Desire for agreement, grudge, open conflict.
s5.description: Winning at the expense of relationships.
s5.advice: Consider if it's worth fighting at any cost.

s6.name: Six of Swords
s6.meaningReversed: No escape, getting stuck, unwanted change.
s6.advice: Leave the past behind and look for a safe haven.

s7.name: Seven of Swords
s7.meaningReversed: Exposure, confession, return of the stolen.
s7.description: Acting in hiding and avoiding confrontation.

s8.name: Eight of Swords
s8.description: A trap built from one's own fears.
s8.advice: Limitations are only in your head. Take off the blindfold.

s9.name: Nine of Swords
s9.advice: Your fears are exaggerated. Talk to someone.

s10.name: Ten of Swords
s10.description: The bottom from which one can only bounce back.
s10.advice: It won't get any worse. Time for a new dawn.

s11.name: Page of Swords
s11.description: Sharp mind and search for truth.

s12.name: Knight of Swords
s12.description: Violent attack of intellect and words.
s12.advice: Defend your points, but watch your words.

s13.name: Queen of Swords
s13.description: A woman of sharp mind, rejecting illusions.
s13.advice: Be guided by logic and don't let yourself be manipulated.

s14.name: King of Swords
s14.description: Ruler of the kingdom of thoughts and analytics.

w1.name: Ace of Wands
w1.meaningReversed: Lack of motivation, delayed start, burnout.
w1.description: Fire of creation and will to act.
w1.advice: Act now while you have the enthusiasm.

w2.name: Two of Wands
w2.meaningUpright: Planning, searching, decisions about the future.
w2.meaningReversed: Fear of the unknown, lack of a plan.
w2.description: The world is open, time to plan the journey.
w2.advice: Get out of your comfort zone and aim high.

w3.name: Three of Wands
w3.meaningUpright: Expansion, long-range visions, waiting for results.
w3.description: Ships have already sailed, soon they will return with profit.
w3.advice: Be patient, your plans will bear fruit.

w4.name: Four of Wands
w4.meaningReversed: Instability, tensions at home, lack of roots.
w4.description: Harmony and joy from achieved goals.
w4.advice: Enjoy your successes with loved ones.

w5.name: Five of Wands
w5.meaningUpright: Competition, rivalry, clash of egos, chaos.
w5.description: Brainstorming and the need to fight for one's position.

w6.name: Six of Wands
w6.advice: Be proud of your achievements, but do not fall into pride.

w7.name: Seven of Wands
w7.description: Maintaining a developed position under pressure.
w7.advice: Do not give in, stand firm.

w8.name: Eight of Wands
w8.advice: React quickly, time is of the essence.

w9.name: Nine of Wands
w9.description: Beaten but still on one's feet, ready for the final blow.
w9.advice: Don't give up, you are so close to the goal.

w10.name: Ten of Wands
w10.description: The burden you took on your shoulders.

w11.name: Page of Wands
w11.meaningUpright: Enthusiasm, discovery, free spirit, new passion.
w11.description: Youthful desire to conquer the world.

w12.name: Knight of Wands
w12.description: Violent force of action and search for thrill.
w12.advice: Act boldly, but be careful not to burn bridges behind you.

w13.name: Queen of Wands
w13.advice: Trust your intuition and be in the center of attention.

w14.name: King of Wands
w14.description: A leader who inspires others to action.

p1.name: Ace of Pentacles
p1.advice: Take care of your resources and plan long-term.

p2.name: Two of Pentacles
p2.description: The art of maintaining balance in a changing world.
p2.advice: Be flexible and don't take on too much.

p3.name: Three of Pentacles
p3.meaningReversed: Lack of harmony in the team, poor quality of work.
p3.description: Building something great with combined forces.

p4.name: Four of Pentacles
p4.meaningReversed: Greed, fear of loss, letting go of control.
p4.advice: Money must flow. Don't be stingy.

p5.name: Five of Pentacles
p5.meaningReversed: Improvement in financial situation, return to health.
p5.description: A temporary crisis and sense of rejection.
p5.advice: Look for help, you are not alone.

p6.name: Six of Pentacles
p6.meaningUpright: Sharing, philanthropy, balance of giving and taking.
p6.description: Mutual help and money energy circulation.
p6.advice: Share what you have, and it will return to you.

p7.name: Seven of Pentacles
p7.meaningUpright: Patience, waiting for crops, assessment of situation.
p7.meaningReversed: No reward for hard work, impatience.
p7.description: Time of waiting for return on investment.
p7.advice: You sowed the seed, now give it time to grow.

p8.name: Eight of Pentacles
p8.description: Focus on work and attention to detail.

p9.name: Nine of Pentacles
p9.description: Enjoying the fruits of one's own work.
p9.advice: Treat yourself to the luxury you worked for.

p10.name: Ten of Pentacles
p10.advice: Take care of your future and your loved ones.

p11.name: Page of Pentacles
p11.meaningReversed: Lack of progress, laziness, loss of opportunity.
p11.advice: Focus on learning and practical application of knowledge.

p12.name: Knight of Pentacles
p12.description: Consistent pursuit of a goal in small steps.
p12.advice: Be methodical and stick to the plan.

p13.name: Queen of Pentacles
p13.meaningReversed: Workaholism, materialism, lack of time for oneself.
p13.advice: Take care of your health, body and surroundings.

p14.name: King of Pentacles
p14.advice: Be sensible in managing your assets.

daily.name: Card of the Day
daily.description: A quick look at today's energy.

three_cards.name: Past, Present, Future
three_cards.description: A classic spread analyzing the passage of time.

love_spread.name: Love Spread
love_spread.description: Analysis of relationships and feelings between two people.

0.label: Your Feelings
0.description: How you feel about this person.

1.label: Partner's Feelings
1.description: How this person feels about you.

career_success.name: Career Path
career_success.description: Analysis of professional and financial situation.

3.label: Advice
3.description: What you should do at work.

4.label: Result
4.description: Where you will be in half a year.

shadow_work.name: Shadow Work
shadow_work.description: Deep analysis of the subconscious and blocks.

0.label: Shadow
0.description: What you don't want to know about yourself.

3.label: Power
3.description: The strength that will be born after transformation.

celtic_cross.name: Celtic Cross
celtic_cross.description: The most powerful, comprehensive spread for any situation.

yes_no.name: Yes/No Oracle
yes_no.description: One card giving a specific answer to a clear question.
